title: AI Filmmaking Workflow: How To Create AI Videos With Full Automation
summary: AI Master demonstrates how to create a complete cinematic short film using TopView Drama Studio, starting from a two-sentence pitch and progressing through character design, dialogue, lighting, and final rendering with no crew required. The workflow shows the tool's capabilities in maintaining character consistency, generating dialogue, and applying cinematic effects automatically.
